units.power: kW or MW instantaneous AC unless otherwise stated
units.energy: kWh or MWh over a defined period
units.availability: percent of expected operating interval available
units.performance_index: actual energy divided by expected energy

performance_index_pct.notes: Use only when expected_energy_kwh is valid and greater than zero.

lost_energy_kwh.notes: Do not count as operational loss until data quality and curtailment checks are complete.

lost_revenue_usd.notes: If PPA rate is unknown, use estimated market/PPA placeholder and label as estimate.

capacity_factor_pct.notes: Can be misleading across different irradiance/weather periods.

current_capacity_pct.notes: Only meaningful during daylight and valid irradiance.

availability_pct.notes: Should exclude nighttime and approved curtailment if contractually allowed.

data_freshness_minutes.notes: High values indicate stale data or communication issue.

meter_scada_delta_pct.notes: Use to identify scaling, meter, or DAS errors.
